caption: A man with light brown hair wearing a navy blue shirt and white headphones appears in a small picture-in-picture window in the lower left of the scene. He is positioned in front of a dark background with a blue screen and a decorated Christmas tree. Behind him, a large graphic display features a stylized autumn theme with yellow leaves and a large orange pumpkin. The text "HARVEST PRESENT" appears in the top left corner, and various game statistics are visible in the top right, including "LV 19 (90)". The central image shows a red, stylized graphic resembling a letter or logo set against a background of wooden fences. In the first frame, the man is speaking with his mouth open. In the subsequent frames, he raises his right index finger to make a point while continuing to speak. The background graphics and on-screen text remain static throughout the sequence.
